shows.name: My Chemical Imbalance
shows.desc: Each show gives a different angle on emo music, often focusing on a single artist or other theme. With the back and forth of the two hosts, it's a fun time all around that's NOT a phase

shows.name: The Crab Corner
shows.desc: We're on the Vector, but that goes both ways! Tune in every Friday for a quick overview of that week's news. 🦀

shows.name: a little bit of everything
shows.desc: There's so much music around today! DJ cup offers listeners an overview of a little bit of everything, a taste test of any kind of genre to guide your next steps. It's always a good time to go exploring.

shows.name: The Spice Cabinet
shows.desc: The Spice Cabinet is a creatively focused show, especially in the hip hop sphere. Every show can bring anything from beatmaking to freestyles, as well as just reviewing music. It's our cool kids show as far as I'm concerned.
shows.hosts: DJ Ronny Revs and DJ D Rev

shows.name: Camp Night with Bear Dentist
shows.desc: Not much of a night show anymore, unfortunately. Camp Night enters its fourth semester with soft, hopeful music of all kinds, typically leaning more indie and electronic. It's a mood show more than a genre show - put it on as you're driving home, as the sky goes orange.
